title: American Electric Power 2024 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing for AEP's utility operating companies, regulated business model, customer footprint, and risk context.

title: AEP Companies
note: Company page identifying AEP's operating utility brands, including AEP Ohio and Appalachian Power.

title: American Electric Power Company Stock Price & Overview
note: Market data reference for approximate market capitalization and PE ratio near the review date.

title: OpenEMS - Open Energy Management System
note: Open-source energy management platform relevant to distributed energy, storage, charging, and local grid-edge control.

title: OpenEMS GitHub Repository
note: Public source repository for the OpenEMS energy management platform.

title: OpenADR Alliance
note: Open standard reference for automated demand response and distributed energy resource coordination.

title: OpenADR FAQ
note: Explains demand response and OpenADR's role in standardizing automated demand-response programs.

title: OpenFMB
note: Grid-edge interoperability standard for common data models, protocol adapters, and distributed intelligence.

title: CRADA Final Report: Open Microgrid Platform
note: Research reference describing open-source, vendor-neutral microgrid control and OpenFMB-enabled interoperability benefits.

title: OpenEEmeter - OpenDSM
note: Open-source toolkit for normalized metered energy consumption and avoided energy measurement, relevant to demand-response verification.

title: OpenEVSE Electric Vehicle Charging Solutions
note: Open-source EV charging hardware and software reference for customer-controlled charging flexibility.

title: OpenEVSE GitHub Organization
note: Public source repositories for OpenEVSE firmware and related EV charging software.
